message:
fix(import): handle titles containing colons in dependency resolution

Titles like "Step 1: Setup Database" were misinterpreted by
parse_dependency as typed dependencies (type="Step 1", id="Setup
Database"), flagged as invalid type, and silently dropped.

Fix: check the full raw dep string against the intra-file title and
stand-in maps BEFORE parsing as type:id. If the raw string matches a
known title or stand-in, resolve it directly as a "blocks" dependency.
Only fall through to parse_dependency for strings that don't match any
intra-file reference.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
